prompt: Storyboard frame 3, vertical 9:16: live gameplay POV of Helix Jump, top-down-ish 3D minimalist view of the rotating helix tower, glossy ball mid-bounce smashing through a stack of electric green (#39FF14) platforms with shatter particles, hot red (#FF0000) trap ring just dodged below, cyan (#5CE1E6) sky background, huge score multiplier 'x8 COMBO!' overlay in bright neon yellow-green, finger-drag swipe indicator hinting tower rotation, simple geometric shapes, bright contrasting colors, no character, clean Helix Jump HUD with combo counter and level progression bar.
